info.title: Maxwell-Daemon API
info.description: Remote control plane for Maxwell-Daemon daemons.

post.description:
Issue a JWT with the requested role.

Requires an admin credential.  The resulting JWT can then be used in
place of the static token for role-scoped access.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Revoke a specific token or all tokens for a subject.

schema.title: Response Revoke Token Api V1 Auth Revoke Post

get.description: Decode and return the caller's JWT claims (or static-token identity).

schema.title: Response Whoami Api V1 Auth Me Get
Response List Backends Api V1 Backends Get
Response Configure Backend Api V1 Backends Post
Response Onboarding Smoke Test Api V1 Onboarding Smoke Test Post
Response List Tasks Api V1 Tasks Get
Response Control Plane Gauntlet Api V1 Control Plane Gauntlet Get
Response List Task Artifacts Api V1 Tasks  Task Id  Artifacts Get
Response List Task Actions Api V1 Tasks  Task Id  Actions Get
Response List Actions Api V1 Actions Get
Response List Work Items Api V1 Work Items Get
Response List Work Item Artifacts Api V1 Work Items  Item Id  Artifacts Get
Response List Task Graphs Api V1 Task Graphs Get

post.description: Assemble repo/task context from the coordinator's shared memory store.

schema.title: Response Assemble Memory Api V1 Memory Assemble Post

post.description: Record a completed task's outcome to the coordinator's shared memory store.

schema.title: Response Record Memory Api V1 Memory Record Post

post.description: Create a GitHub issue. Optionally dispatch the daemon immediately.

schema.title: Response Create Issue Api V1 Issues Post

post.description: Queue an existing issue for the daemon to draft a PR for.
Race multiple backends on the same issue — reviewer picks the winner.

schema.title: Response Ab Dispatch Issue Api V1 Issues Ab Dispatch Post
Response List Templates Api V1 Templates Get

get.description: Fetch a specific task template by ID.

schema.title: Response Get Template Api V1 Templates  Template Id  Get

post.description:
Queue up to 100 issues in one call.

Per-item failures (e.g. submit_issue raising ValueError) are recorded
but don't abort the batch — callers get back separate dispatched/
failed counts plus per-item details.

schema.title: Response Batch Dispatch Issues Api V1 Issues Batch Dispatch Post
Response List Repo Issues Api V1 Issues  Owner   Name  Get

post.description:
Register a Web Push subscription.

Currently a stub. Real implementation requires storing the subscription
and generating a VAPID keypair.

schema.title: Response Push Subscribe Api V1 Push Subscribe Post

post.description:
Workers POST here every heartbeat_seconds to stay registered as alive.

Body: {"machine_name": "<name>"}
Coordinators use last-seen timestamps to detect dead workers and requeue
their DISPATCHED tasks.

schema.title: Response Worker Heartbeat Api V1 Heartbeat Post

get.description:
Return fleet manifest data merged with live task counts per repo.

When role == "coordinator", also aggregates per-machine health summaries
from remote workers via RemoteDaemonClient health checks.
When role == "worker" or "standalone", shows local tasks only.

schema.title: Response Fleet Overview Api V1 Fleet Get

get.description: Return a redacted capability registry snapshot for dispatch decisions.

schema.title: Response Fleet Capabilities Api V1 Fleet Nodes Get

get.description: Return a redacted capability registry snapshot for dispatch decisions.

schema.title: Response Fleet Capabilities Api V1 Fleet Capabilities Get

get.description: Return paginated audit log entries (oldest first).

schema.title: Response Audit Log Api V1 Audit Get

get.description: Verify the audit log hash chain.  Returns violations (empty = clean).

schema.title: Response Audit Verify Api V1 Audit Verify Get

post.description:
Reload daemon config from disk without restarting.

Atomically swaps the in-memory config and router so running workers are
not interrupted. Requires operator role (or static bearer token when JWT
is not configured).

Returns the path that was reloaded and an ISO-8601 timestamp.

schema.title: Response Reload Config Api Reload Post

get.description: Return current worker count and queue depth.

schema.title: Response Workers Status Api V1 Workers Get

put.description: Rescale the worker pool to *count* workers.

schema.title: Response Set Workers Api V1 Workers Put

get.description: List durable delegate sessions and their latest recovery evidence.

schema.title: Response List Delegate Sessions Api V1 Delegate Sessions Get

get.description: Return one durable delegate session snapshot.

schema.title: Response Prune History Api V1 Admin Prune Get

post.description:
Receive GitHub webhook events.

Authenticated with HMAC-SHA256 via X-Hub-Signature-256. No bearer-token
dependency is applied so GitHub's retry delivery system isn't double-gated.

Trigger a task from any external source via a generic HTTP webhook.

Unlike the GitHub endpoint this route is bearer-token authenticated
(operator role).  Optionally supply ``X-Maxwell-Signature: sha256=<hex>``
for an additional HMAC-SHA256 layer using the daemon's
``webhook_secret`` config value, and ``X-Idempotency-Key`` to prevent
duplicate task creation on webhook retries.

schema.title: Response Ssh Sessions Api V1 Ssh Sessions Get

get.description: List machines that have stored SSH keys.

schema.title: Response Ssh List Keys Api V1 Ssh Keys Get

get.description: Return the public key for *machine*, generating it if absent.

schema.title: Response Ssh Get Key Api V1 Ssh Keys  Machine  Get
Response Ssh Delete Key Api V1 Ssh Keys  Machine  Delete

post.description: Open (or reuse) an SSH session and return its summary.

schema.title: Response Ssh Connect Api V1 Ssh Connect Post

post.description: Run a command on a remote machine and return its output.

schema.title: Response Ssh Run Api V1 Ssh Run Post

get.description: List files on a remote machine via SFTP.

schema.title: Response Ssh List Files Api V1 Ssh Files Get

AssignmentLease.title: AssignmentLease
AssignmentLease.description: Exclusive write lease for one delegate session.

Checkpoint.title: Checkpoint
Checkpoint.description: Durable delegate recovery evidence captured during execution.

DelegateSession.title: DelegateSession
DelegateSession.description: Concrete execution session for a logical delegate.

DelegateSessionSnapshot.title: DelegateSessionSnapshot
DelegateSessionSnapshot.description: Durable readback for one delegate session and its evidence.

DelegateSessionStatus.title: DelegateSessionStatus
DelegateSessionStatus.description: Lifecycle status for one concrete delegate execution session.

GraphNode.title: GraphNode
GraphNode.description: One role invocation in a delivery graph.

HandoffArtifact.title: HandoffArtifact
HandoffArtifact.description: Typed evidence or work product handed from one delegate to another.

LeaseRecoveryPolicy.title: LeaseRecoveryPolicy
LeaseRecoveryPolicy.description: Recovery behavior once a session lease expires.

TaskGraph.title: TaskGraph
TaskGraph.description: Validated DAG of named sub-agent roles for one work item.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Prompt text must be between 1 and 500,000 characters

anyOf.description: Task ID: alphanumeric and dashes, max 256 chars
Generic routing key or repository identifier

depends_on.title: Depends On
depends_on.description: Task IDs that must reach COMPLETED before this task starts.
